description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS 11 CI that runs on pull requests and pushes to main branch or tags. Use a macos-12 job matrix to test with LLVM versions 12, 13, 14, and 16. For each job, checkout sources with submodules, detect package metadata, install ansible, run a CI task with ansible-playbook, and publish or move the package depending on the presence of a Cloudsmith API key.
